text.title: Prompt A/B Power Calculator Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: support-bot greeting variant, baseline 0.62, MDE 0.04 → per-arm n.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Team: Faion ML-engineering. Task: A/B greeting variant in support-bot.

Step 1. Inputs collected:
baseline_rate = 0.62 (CSAT-positive after greeting)
mde = 0.04 (product wants +4 pp absolute)
alpha = 0.05, power = 0.8 (stats policy)
traffic_per_day = 1200, cadence_window = 7 days
Step 2. Compute n with two-proportion z-test:
Step 3. Feasibility: days_required = ceil(2 · 2350 / 1200) = 4 days ≤ 7-day window. Feasible.
Step 5. Committed. A/B scheduled to start Thursday, end +4 days.
